## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Which `just` targets did you run? -->

- [ ] `just fmt` — no format changes needed
- [ ] `just check` — compiles cleanly
- [ ] `just lint` — zero clippy warnings
- [ ] `just test` — unit tests pass
- [ ] `just functional-tests` — functional suite passes (required for storage/ingestion changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes user-facing behavior (README, examples, API docs)
- [ ] No breaking changes, OR breaking changes are noted above and a migration path is described
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added (for user-visible changes)
